sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10147" key="a)ntimesoura/nhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιμεσουρᾰ´ν-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n10147.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">occupation of the opposite meridian,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:1:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
